statement: Centralizing stage progression in orchestrators (not domain services) will remove duplicate pending/attempt checks and reduce inconsistent retry semantics.
rationale: Both `WindowOrchestrator.listPendingTargets` and `window_service.maybeAdvanceWindowStage` compute pending requests and max attempts.
keyAssumptions: Domain services can call a single orchestrator API for stage advancement
validationCriteria: Stage completion logic exists in one place
critiquePoints: Orchestrator may need more access to domain data
questions: Which domain transitions must remain in services for data integrity?
